quests.title: WORKSTATION CONTACT
quests.brief: Your desk is idle. Signal output requires a functioning operative. Make contact.
quests.objective: Navigate to your desk and interact with it.
quests.hint: The desk is your primary intelligence node. Every session there sharpens your read on the world.

quests.title: SCROLL LOCATE
quests.brief: A scroll has been flagged in your vicinity. Retrieve it before it degrades.
quests.objective: Find and pick up one Skill Scroll anywhere in the current map.
quests.hint: Knowledge has to be found before it can be used. Locating it is the first act of intelligence.

quests.title: BOOKSHELF SCAN
quests.brief: Your bookshelf contains archived intelligence. Access it.
quests.objective: Navigate to your bookshelf and interact with it.
quests.hint: The archive is only useful if you visit it. Presence is the precondition for learning.

quests.title: DESK REPORT
quests.brief: The System requires a presence log at your workstation. Report in.
quests.objective: Spend 10 seconds at your desk without moving.
quests.hint: Stillness at the workstation is a signal — the operative is in study mode, not transit mode.

quests.title: ROUTE MEMORISATION
quests.brief: An operative who does not know their environment cannot read it. Map the flat.
quests.objective: Walk every room in your flat: entrance, bedroom, study.
quests.hint: Knowing your space reduces cognitive load. The mind is freed to observe, not navigate.

quests.title: OBSERVATION WINDOW
quests.brief: Stand at a window. Note what is outside. The System is logging your read accuracy.
quests.objective: Find a window tile in your flat and stand adjacent to it.
quests.hint: Observing the world from a fixed point trains spatial awareness. What you ignore becomes a blind spot.

quests.title: SIGNAL TRACE
quests.brief: Something in the neighbourhood emits an unusual frequency. Identify it.
quests.objective: Reach the neighbourhood and locate one lamp post.
quests.hint: Pattern recognition begins with noticing. The operative who ignores anomalies falls first.

quests.title: ARCHIVE EXTRACTION
quests.brief: One piece of knowledge is sitting uncollected. Extract it now.
quests.objective: Interact with the bookshelf and then the desk in the same session.
quests.hint: Cross-referencing sources deepens retention. Single-source thinking creates fragile knowledge.

quests.title: DUAL SCROLL PROTOCOL
quests.brief: One scroll is information. Two is a pattern. Collect both.
quests.objective: Pick up two Skill Scrolls in the same session.
quests.hint: Connecting two pieces of knowledge is where intelligence actually begins.

quests.title: WORKSTATION SESSION
quests.brief: The desk logs sessions, not visits. Return three times in one day.
quests.objective: Interact with your desk three times in a single play session.
quests.hint: Consistency at the workstation compounds. Three sessions build the habit that one cannot.

quests.title: NEIGHBOURHOOD SURVEY
quests.brief: Your intelligence is only as good as your map of the territory. Survey the full block.
quests.objective: Walk to all four corners of the neighbourhood map.
quests.hint: Complete environmental awareness is the foundation of situational intelligence.

quests.title: SCROLL AND DESK
quests.brief: Collect intelligence, then process it. The full loop in one session.
quests.objective: Pick up a scroll, then interact with your desk before leaving the flat.
quests.hint: Collection without processing is hoarding. The desk closes the loop.

quests.title: NIGHT PATROL READ
quests.brief: The neighbourhood looks different after dark. Walk the main path and observe.
quests.objective: Walk the full length of the main crossing path in the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: The environment reveals different data at different times. The trained observer catches what others miss.

quests.title: ARCHIVE CROSS-CHECK
quests.brief: The bookshelf contains what others have learned before you. Use it.
quests.objective: Interact with the bookshelf twice in one session.
quests.hint: Returning to the archive reinforces retention. One pass is exposure. Two is study.

quests.title: SIGNAL MAP
quests.brief: Three landmarks. Mark them in your mind before the Faction does.
quests.objective: Locate and stand near the lamp, a stall, and a plant in the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Landmark memory is the precursor to tactical navigation.

quests.title: DRIFTER OBSERVATION
quests.brief: You do not have to fight today. Watch how a Drifter moves. Learn its pattern.
quests.objective: Get within visible range of a Drifter without engaging it.
quests.hint: Observation before action is the highest form of intelligence. You cannot counter what you have not studied.

quests.title: TRIPLE SCROLL ACQUISITION
quests.brief: The Stagnation Faction destroys knowledge. Collect three scrolls before they do.
quests.objective: Pick up three Skill Scrolls in one session.
quests.hint: Volume of exposure matters. Three data points form the beginning of a pattern.

quests.title: FULL ARCHIVE SESSION
quests.brief: Every shelf. Every section. No shortcuts.
quests.objective: Interact with the bookshelf, then the desk, then the bookshelf again in one session.
quests.hint: The full cycle — archive, process, re-check — is how experts separate what they know from what they think they know.

quests.title: ENEMY PATTERN STUDY
quests.brief: You have encountered Drifters before. Today you chart their routes.
quests.objective: Follow a Drifter for 10 seconds without being caught or engaging it.
quests.hint: Patience is intelligence in action. The operative who studies before acting wins before the first move.

quests.title: BOTH MAPS SURVEYED
quests.brief: The neighbourhood and the flat. One session. Complete survey.
quests.objective: Fully traverse both maps — home flat and neighbourhood — in the same play session.
quests.hint: The operative with a complete map makes no avoidable mistakes. Incomplete maps cost HP.

quests.title: DESK COMPOUND SESSION
quests.brief: Four visits to the workstation. The System is measuring depth, not frequency.
quests.objective: Interact with your desk four times in one session.
quests.hint: Compound sessions build the neural architecture for focused work. Frequency precedes depth.

quests.title: SCROLL NETWORK
quests.brief: Scrolls are scattered across the world for a reason. Collect and map the distribution.
quests.objective: Find scrolls in both the flat and the neighbourhood in the same session.
quests.hint: Intelligence is not confined to one location. The operative who limits their search limits their knowledge.

quests.title: COUNTER-SURVEILLANCE
quests.brief: You have been watched. Now you watch back. Identify three Stagnation elements in the neighbourhood.
quests.objective: Spot three Drifters or antagonist NPCs in the neighbourhood in one session.
quests.hint: Identifying threats before they act is the definition of tactical intelligence.

quests.title: SILENT STUDY
quests.brief: The flat is your sanctuary. Spend time in every room without triggering any encounter.
quests.objective: Move through all rooms of the flat without leaving or triggering any events.
quests.hint: Controlled environments accelerate learning. The flat is your laboratory.

quests.title: SCROLL SWEEP
quests.brief: All available scrolls. One session. No exceptions.
quests.objective: Collect every scroll visible on the current map.
quests.hint: Total information acquisition is the tier-3 standard. Anything left on the field is intelligence lost.

quests.title: DRIFTER DECODE
quests.brief: Patrol pattern identified. Route memorised. Engage and win.
quests.objective: Defeat a Drifter after observing its movement pattern for at least 5 seconds first.
quests.hint: Applied intelligence is intelligence that changes outcomes. Study then act.

quests.title: FULL WORLD AUDIT
quests.brief: The System requires a complete environmental assessment. Both maps. All landmarks. All threats.
quests.objective: Traverse both full maps and identify all interactable objects in one session.
quests.hint: Mastery is knowing the terrain so well that nothing surprises you.

quests.title: KNOWLEDGE COMPOUND
quests.brief: Five desk interactions. Three scrolls. One session. This is what peak study looks like.
quests.objective: Interact with your desk five times and collect three scrolls in one session.
quests.hint: Elite intelligence work is not a burst — it is sustained engagement with multiple sources simultaneously.

quests.title: THREAT LIBRARY
quests.brief: You have encountered every Faction operative type. Document them.
quests.objective: Get visual range on a Drifter, a Distractor, and an Anchor in one session.
quests.hint: A complete threat library means no encounter is ever truly new. Pattern recognition becomes instant.

quests.title: ARCHIVE COMPLETE
quests.brief: Every interactable in the flat. Every object. Nothing left unread.
quests.objective: Interact with every interactable object in the flat in one session.
quests.hint: Thoroughness is a discipline. The operative who skips steps leaves gaps that cost them later.

quests.title: SHADOW PROTOCOL
quests.brief: Move through both maps without being detected by any operative. Ghost run.
quests.objective: Complete both maps without triggering any encounter or being spotted.
quests.hint: True intelligence mastery is making every move invisible. The threat never knew you were there.

quests.title: THE FULL LOOP
quests.brief: Flat to neighbourhood and back. Every interactable hit. All scrolls collected. One session.
quests.objective: Complete a full round-trip between both maps interacting with every available object.
quests.hint: This is what full operational competence looks like. The System logs it permanently.

quests.title: EXIT PROTOCOL
quests.brief: You have been inside too long. The System requires external signal. Leave the flat.
quests.objective: Walk through your front door and enter the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Movement is the first output of strength. Staying still is how the Stagnation Faction wins.

quests.title: PERIMETER WALK
quests.brief: Walk the boundary of the flat. Do not cut through the centre. Full perimeter.
quests.objective: Walk along the outer walls of your flat without cutting through the middle.
quests.hint: Discipline in movement builds operational awareness. The perimeter walk is the simplest form of patrol.

quests.title: FIRST STEPS OUTSIDE
quests.brief: The neighbourhood exists. You must verify this personally.
quests.objective: Step outside and walk 10 tiles in any direction in the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Presence in the world is the foundation of every strength-based action. You cannot build from inside.

quests.title: SURVIVE THE CROSSING
quests.brief: Cross the main horizontal path in the neighbourhood without stopping.
quests.objective: Walk from one side of the main crossing path to the other without pausing.
quests.hint: Momentum is a form of strength. The operative who stops loses it.

quests.title: FRONT DOOR RETURN
quests.brief: You left. Now return. The loop must close.
quests.objective: Exit your flat, enter the neighbourhood, then return home in one session.
quests.hint: Completing circuits is what distinguishes active operatives from those who drift.

quests.title: GROUND COVER
quests.brief: The neighbourhood is large. Cover it.
quests.objective: Walk from the home entrance to the far end of the neighbourhood path.
quests.hint: Distance covered is evidence of output. The System tracks every step.

quests.title: WALL PUSH
quests.brief: Every room in your flat. Continuous movement. No stopping.
quests.objective: Walk through every room in the flat without stopping for more than 1 second.
quests.hint: Sustained movement trains the operative to keep executing even when resistance appears.

quests.title: STAGNATION RESISTANCE
quests.brief: The Faction wants you stationary. Deny them. Leave the spawn point.
quests.objective: Move at least 20 tiles from your starting position in any direction.
quests.hint: The first act of resistance is movement. Staying is surrender.

quests.title: FULL CIRCUIT
quests.brief: One complete loop of the neighbourhood. Clockwise. No shortcuts.
quests.objective: Walk the full outer perimeter of the neighbourhood map.
quests.hint: Full circuits build endurance. Half-circuits build the habit of quitting halfway.

quests.title: ENCOUNTER SURVIVAL
quests.brief: A Drifter stands between you and your destination. Go through it, not around.
quests.objective: Engage and survive an encounter with a Drifter operative.
quests.hint: Strength includes the willingness to engage directly. Avoidance is a form of decay.

quests.title: RAPID TRANSIT
quests.brief: Both maps. No dawdling. The System is timing you.
quests.objective: Move from your flat spawn to the furthest point of the neighbourhood in under 60 seconds.
quests.hint: Speed under pressure is a strength metric. Slow movement in danger is a liability.

quests.title: BACK AND FORTH
quests.brief: Neighbourhood to flat. Flat to neighbourhood. Do it twice.
quests.objective: Make two complete round trips between the flat and the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Repetition is how strength is built. Two circuits produces double the output signal.

quests.title: MARKET PRESENCE
quests.brief: The Stagnation Faction avoids the market. You will not.
quests.objective: Reach the market stalls in the neighbourhood and walk between all of them.
quests.hint: Presence in busy areas is a declaration. It requires and builds operational confidence.

quests.title: MAP CLEAR
quests.brief: Walk every accessible tile in the neighbourhood. Leave no ground uncovered.
quests.objective: Explore every accessible area of the neighbourhood map.
quests.hint: Complete territorial coverage is a strength signal. The operative who has been everywhere fears nothing.

quests.title: COMBAT LOG
quests.brief: Two encounters. Two outcomes. The System records both.
quests.objective: Engage two separate encounters in one session.
quests.hint: Volume of engagement builds the physical and mental capacity for sustained conflict.

quests.title: DOUBLE PERIMETER
quests.brief: The neighbourhood perimeter. Twice. No stopping.
quests.objective: Walk the outer boundary of the neighbourhood map twice in one session.
quests.hint: Repeated effort against the same challenge is how endurance is built.

quests.title: THREE ENCOUNTER CLEAR
quests.brief: Three Faction operatives. Three wins. One session.
quests.objective: Win three encounters in a single play session.
quests.hint: Consecutive victories compound. Each win makes the next easier because the Faction expects you to stop.

quests.title: CROSS-MAP SPRINT
quests.brief: Flat to neighbourhood to flat. Three full round trips. One session.
quests.objective: Complete three round trips between both maps without stopping.
quests.hint: Three repetitions of a physical challenge builds the baseline the Faction tries to erode.

quests.title: MARKET DOMINATION
quests.brief: Every stall. Every lamp. Walk the full market section without detour.
quests.objective: Visit every stall and lamp post in the neighbourhood market area.
quests.hint: Operational thoroughness in populated areas is a higher-tier strength signal.

quests.title: ANCHOR ENGAGEMENT
quests.brief: The Anchor is the Faction's heaviest operative. Engage it.
quests.objective: Initiate and survive an encounter with an Anchor operative.
quests.hint: Fighting the strongest available threat is how the ceiling of strength is raised.

quests.title: NO-DAMAGE RUN
quests.brief: Complete the neighbourhood circuit without taking any HP damage.
quests.objective: Walk the full neighbourhood perimeter without triggering any enemy contact.
quests.hint: Strength includes the discipline to avoid unnecessary damage. Conservation is operational.

quests.title: MARATHON SESSION
quests.brief: Both maps. Every room. Every path. No fast travel. Full traverse.
quests.objective: Visit every accessible tile in both the flat and the neighbourhood in one session.
quests.hint: The operative who can cover the full world without degrading is tier-2 strength.

quests.title: COMBAT CHAIN
quests.brief: Four encounters. No rest between them. The System is measuring your recovery.
quests.objective: Win four encounters in one session without returning to your flat between them.
quests.hint: Chained engagements test whether strength holds under accumulation, not just in isolation.

quests.title: PERIMETER HOLD
quests.brief: Walk the flat perimeter five times. No shortcuts. The System counts the loops.
quests.objective: Walk the full inner perimeter of your flat five times in one session.
quests.hint: Repetitive physical circuits build the endurance that dramatic single efforts cannot.

quests.title: FACTION SWEEP
quests.brief: Every operative type. One session. Full engagement record.
quests.objective: Engage a Drifter, a Distractor, and an Anchor in a single session.
quests.hint: Elite strength is not about fighting hard. It is about being ready for anything.

quests.title: FULL WORLD TRAVERSE
quests.brief: Both maps. Full coverage. No stops. The System logs completion.
quests.objective: Traverse every accessible tile of both maps in one session without stopping.
quests.hint: Complete world coverage is the tier-3 strength standard. The map holds no surprises.

quests.title: FIVE ENCOUNTER STREAK
quests.brief: Five wins. No losses in between. End the streak intentionally.
quests.objective: Win five consecutive encounters without losing any.
quests.hint: Sustained winning under pressure is the definition of operational strength at the top tier.

quests.title: THE ANCHOR HUNT
quests.brief: Find the Anchor. Engage. Win. Do not stop until it falls.
quests.objective: Defeat an Anchor operative without retreating during the encounter.
quests.hint: The heaviest challenge in the world requires and produces the deepest strength.

quests.title: IRON CIRCUIT
quests.brief: Five full neighbourhood circuits. Back to back. The Faction can see you. Do it anyway.
quests.objective: Walk the neighbourhood outer perimeter five times consecutively.
quests.hint: The Faction's strongest weapon is attrition. Five circuits proves it has no effect on you.

quests.title: ZERO DAMAGE COMBAT
quests.brief: Win an encounter without taking a single point of damage.
quests.objective: Complete an encounter with 100% HP intact.
quests.hint: Perfect execution is the tier-3 standard. Strength without precision is just noise.

quests.title: WORLD DOMINATION
quests.brief: Everything. One session. The System will remember this.
quests.objective: Complete full coverage of both maps and win at least one encounter in the same session.
quests.hint: This is what total operational strength looks like. The world is your training ground.

quests.title: THE GAUNTLET
quests.brief: Three Anchors. Three wins. No HP recovery between them.
quests.objective: Defeat three Anchors in one session without visiting the rest point between fights.
quests.hint: The gauntlet exists to find the ceiling. Reaching it proves yours is higher than the Faction calculated.

quests.title: PRESENCE DECLARATION
quests.brief: You are not invisible. Step into a public space and let the neighbourhood see you.
quests.objective: Walk to the main crossing in the neighbourhood and stand there for 5 seconds.
quests.hint: Presence precedes influence. You cannot build rapport from inside a building.

quests.title: FIRST CONTACT
quests.brief: There is an NPC nearby. Approach. You do not have to speak. Just close the distance.
quests.objective: Walk within 3 tiles of any NPC without initiating dialogue.
quests.hint: Proximity is the first act of social engagement. Comfort with closeness is trainable.

quests.title: MARKET WALK
quests.brief: The market stalls attract people. Be seen there.
quests.objective: Walk through the market stall area of the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Being seen in social spaces is a signal to NPCs and to the System that you are building presence.

quests.title: NEIGHBOURHOOD DEBUT
quests.brief: The neighbourhood does not know your name yet. Change that.
quests.objective: Enter the neighbourhood and walk to the area with the most NPCs.
quests.hint: The operative who stays isolated builds no social capital. Appearing is the first investment.

quests.title: OPEN DIALOGUE
quests.brief: One NPC. One conversation. The System is not grading the content — just the initiation.
quests.objective: Initiate dialogue with any NPC.
quests.hint: Starting a conversation is the hardest part. Everything after that is momentum.

quests.title: RETURN VISIT
quests.brief: You were here before. The neighbourhood noticed. Come back.
quests.objective: Visit the same NPC or location you interacted with last session.
quests.hint: Consistency of presence builds reputation before a word is said.

quests.title: LAMP CIRCUIT
quests.brief: The lamp posts mark the gathering points. Visit them all.
quests.objective: Find and stand near every lamp post in the neighbourhood.
quests.hint: Landmarks are social anchors. Knowing where people gather is the foundation of influence.

quests.title: STILL POINT
quests.brief: Stop in the centre of the neighbourhood and do not move for 10 seconds. Be present.
quests.objective: Stand in the centre of the neighbourhood map without moving for 10 seconds.
quests.hint: Stillness in public reads as confidence. Comfort with being observed builds charisma.

quests.title: TWO NPC CONTACT
quests.brief: Two conversations. Two different people. Same session.
quests.objective: Initiate dialogue with two different NPCs in one session.
quests.hint: Social range is built by making contact with multiple people. One conversation is a visit. Two is a pattern.

quests.title: MARKET SOCIAL
quests.brief: Spend time at the market and talk to whoever is nearby.
quests.objective: Initiate dialogue with an NPC who is near a market stall.
quests.hint: Markets are social condensers. The operative who works them builds information and influence simultaneously.

quests.title: FULL NEIGHBOURHOOD PRESENCE
quests.brief: Walk the full neighbourhood. Be seen in every section.
quests.objective: Traverse the full neighbourhood map including the market area and both path crossings.
quests.hint: Comprehensive visibility in a territory builds reputation without a word spoken.

quests.title: QUEST ACCEPTED
quests.brief: An NPC has something for you. Take it.
quests.objective: Accept a quest from any NPC.
quests.hint: Receiving a task from an NPC is a social signal — they trust you enough to give you something to do.

quests.title: REPEAT CONTACT
quests.brief: Find the same NPC you spoke to before. Return to them.
quests.objective: Speak to the same NPC twice in one session.
quests.hint: Repeat contact builds depth of relationship. One conversation is introduction. Two is connection.

quests.title: NEIGHBOURHOOD LOOP
quests.brief: Walk the full perimeter. Acknowledge every NPC you pass.
quests.objective: Walk the neighbourhood perimeter and stop near at least two NPCs.
quests.hint: The operative who acknowledges others as they move through a space is building invisible influence.

quests.title: SOCIAL ANCHOR
quests.brief: Find the NPC who talks the most. Stay in their range.
quests.objective: Stand within 3 tiles of the most active NPC in the neighbourhood for 10 seconds.
quests.hint: Proximity to communicative people builds social fluency passively. You absorb their patterns.

quests.title: QUEST CHAIN
quests.brief: One quest was not enough for the System. Accept two.
quests.objective: Accept quests from two different NPCs in one session.
quests.hint: Holding multiple social commitments simultaneously is the tier-1 charisma standard.

quests.title: THREE-NPC SESSION
quests.brief: Three NPCs. Three conversations. One session. The neighbourhood is starting to know your name.
quests.objective: Initiate dialogue with three different NPCs in one session.
quests.hint: Three conversations in one session is the point at which reputation begins to form in a community.

quests.title: QUEST COMPLETION
quests.brief: You accepted a quest. Now finish it.
quests.objective: Complete a quest received from an NPC.
quests.hint: Following through is what separates respected operatives from forgotten ones.

quests.title: MARKET DOMINATION
quests.brief: Every stall. Every vendor. Your presence recorded at each.
quests.objective: Talk to every NPC in the market stall area in one session.
quests.hint: Complete coverage of a social space in one visit is a tier-2 charisma signal.

quests.title: ANTAGONIST DIALOGUE
quests.brief: The antagonist NPC does not trust you. Approach them anyway.
quests.objective: Initiate dialogue with the antagonist NPC.
quests.hint: Willingness to engage with difficult social contacts is an advanced charisma skill.

quests.title: SOCIAL CIRCUIT
quests.brief: Talk to someone. Walk a circuit. Return and talk again.
quests.objective: Talk to an NPC, walk the neighbourhood perimeter, then return and talk to the same NPC.
quests.hint: Re-approaching after an absence signals interest. NPCs register it as genuine engagement.

quests.title: TWO-QUEST COMPLETION
quests.brief: Two quests received. Two quests delivered. The neighbourhood owes you.
quests.objective: Complete two quests from NPCs in the same session.
quests.hint: Fulfilling multiple social contracts simultaneously builds deep community trust.

quests.title: SUSTAINED PRESENCE
quests.brief: Stay in the neighbourhood for a full session without retreating to the flat.
quests.objective: Complete a full play session in the neighbourhood without returning home.
quests.hint: Extended presence in social territory is how influence is accumulated. The operative who leaves loses ground.

quests.title: SOCIAL MAP
quests.brief: Know every NPC in the neighbourhood. Make contact with each.
quests.objective: Speak to every NPC in the neighbourhood in one session.
quests.hint: Complete social mapping of a territory is the tier-2 charisma threshold.

quests.title: FULL SOCIAL SWEEP
quests.brief: Every NPC in the world. One session. No one left uncontacted.
quests.objective: Speak to every NPC across both maps in one session.
quests.hint: Total social coverage is the tier-3 standard. You know everyone. Everyone knows you.

quests.title: QUEST CHAIN COMPLETE
quests.brief: Three quests accepted. Three completed. All in one session.
quests.objective: Accept and complete three quests in a single play session.
quests.hint: Rapid execution of social commitments builds an unbreakable reputation for reliability.

quests.title: ANTAGONIST ALLIANCE
quests.brief: The antagonist NPC was your enemy. Now they give you something.
quests.objective: Reach a positive dialogue outcome with the antagonist NPC.
quests.hint: Converting a hostile contact is the peak charisma achievement. Influence at its most complete.

quests.title: NEIGHBOURHOOD ANCHOR
quests.brief: You are the most present operative in the neighbourhood. Prove it.
quests.objective: Spend a full session in the neighbourhood interacting with every NPC and visiting every social space.
quests.hint: When everyone in a territory has spoken to you, you own the social network. That is tier-3 charisma.

quests.title: FACTION SOCIAL
quests.brief: An antagonist wants something. Give it to them strategically.
quests.objective: Complete a quest received from an antagonist NPC.
quests.hint: Completing objectives for hostile contacts converts them. Influence requires operating across all factions.

quests.title: FIVE NPC SESSION
quests.brief: Five conversations. Different people. One session. The neighbourhood talks about you now.
quests.objective: Speak to five different NPCs in one play session.
quests.hint: Five distinct conversations in a session is the social equivalent of holding the room.

quests.title: SOCIAL ARCHITECT
quests.brief: You know the neighbourhood better than the neighbourhood knows itself.
quests.objective: Complete a full social and spatial survey — all NPCs contacted, all locations visited — in one session.
quests.hint: The social architect does not react to the world. They have already mapped it.

quests.title: REPUTATION LOCK
quests.brief: Complete three quests and talk to every NPC in one session. Your name is currency here now.
quests.objective: Achieve full NPC contact and three quest completions in a single session.
quests.hint: Reputation is locked when your actions have compounded across every social relationship available. This is that.

quests.title: WALL AVOID
quests.brief: Navigate from your spawn to the door without touching any wall. Precision only.
quests.objective: Walk from your starting position to the front door without colliding with any wall or obstacle.
quests.hint: Precise navigation is the first dexterity training available. Clean movement through known space.

quests.title: PATH DISCIPLINE
quests.brief: Walk the path in the neighbourhood without stepping onto the grass. Stay on stone.
quests.objective: Walk the full length of the main path without stepping off it.
quests.hint: Staying on the path when the grass is available trains deliberate movement choice.

quests.title: QUICK EXIT
quests.brief: Your flat to the front door. No unnecessary movements. Direct route only.
quests.objective: Navigate from any position in your flat to the front door in the most direct route.
quests.hint: Efficiency of movement is the foundation of dexterity. The shortest path between two points.

quests.title: DRIFTER DODGE
quests.brief: A Drifter is in your path. Navigate around it without triggering the encounter.
quests.objective: Pass within 5 tiles of a Drifter without triggering an encounter.
quests.hint: Avoidance when avoidance is optimal is intelligence, not cowardice. Knowing when not to engage.

quests.title: STALL WEAVE
quests.brief: The market stalls create obstacles. Navigate between them without stopping.
quests.objective: Walk through the market stall area without stopping at any point.
quests.hint: Fluid movement through obstacles trains the operative to read spaces in motion, not at rest.

quests.title: LAMP TO LAMP
quests.brief: Lamp post to lamp post. Direct line. No detours.
quests.objective: Walk directly from one lamp post to the next without deviating from the most direct path.
quests.hint: Executing point-to-point navigation with precision is the tier-0 dexterity baseline.

quests.title: ROOM CLEAR
quests.brief: One room in your flat. Navigate every corner without touching the walls.
quests.objective: Walk around the full interior of one room in your flat without touching the boundary walls.
quests.hint: Spatial precision in confined spaces is the first test of true dexterity.

quests.title: SILENT TRANSIT
quests.brief: Cross the neighbourhood without being spotted by any NPC or operative.
quests.objective: Walk from the home entrance to the far end of the neighbourhood without entering the visual range of any NPC.
quests.hint: Undetected movement is the first dexterity advantage. The operative who is not seen has no opponent.

quests.title: PATH FULL RUN
quests.brief: Every path tile in the neighbourhood. No grass. No walls. Paths only.
quests.objective: Walk every path tile in the neighbourhood map without stepping off the paths.
quests.hint: Complete path discipline across the full neighbourhood is the tier-1 dexterity standard.

quests.title: TWO DRIFTER DODGE
quests.brief: Two Drifters between you and your destination. Avoid both.
quests.objective: Pass near two different Drifters without triggering either encounter.
quests.hint: Multi-threat avoidance requires reading multiple movement patterns simultaneously.

quests.title: SPEED TRANSIT
quests.brief: Flat to neighbourhood. Fastest possible route. No stops.
quests.objective: Navigate from your flat spawn to the neighbourhood crossing in under 15 seconds.
quests.hint: Speed through a familiar environment is a dexterity expression. The path is memorised. The movement is automatic.

quests.title: CLEAN CORRIDOR
quests.brief: Every room in the flat. Walls untouched. One pass.
quests.objective: Walk through every room in the flat without touching any wall.
quests.hint: Clean movement through a full interior is the tier-1 precision test.

quests.title: EVASION CIRCUIT
quests.brief: Navigate the neighbourhood perimeter without entering range of any enemy.
quests.objective: Walk the full neighbourhood perimeter without entering the detection range of any operative.
quests.hint: Perimeter navigation with full threat avoidance requires map knowledge and constant adjustment.

quests.title: DIAGONAL RUN
quests.brief: Corner to corner. Diagonal line. No deviations.
quests.objective: Navigate from one corner of the neighbourhood to the diagonally opposite corner in a straight line.
quests.hint: Straight-line navigation through an irregular environment tests real-time path calculation.

quests.title: MARKET WEAVE
quests.brief: Through the market. Between every stall. Never stopping.
quests.objective: Navigate between every market stall in the neighbourhood without stopping at any point.
quests.hint: Continuous fluid movement through a complex environment is the tier-1 dexterity challenge.

quests.title: GHOST TRANSIT
quests.brief: Both maps. Not seen once.
quests.objective: Travel through both maps without entering the detection range of any NPC or operative.
quests.hint: Total invisibility across two maps requires mastery of both movement and threat positioning.

quests.title: FLAWLESS FLAT
quests.brief: Every room. Every tile. Zero wall contacts. One pass.
quests.objective: Complete a full traverse of the flat without touching any wall or obstacle.
quests.hint: Flawless navigation of a known space is the tier-2 precision standard.

quests.title: TRIPLE DRIFTER PASS
quests.brief: Three Drifters. Three passes. Zero encounters.
quests.objective: Pass within visual range of three different Drifters without triggering any of them.
quests.hint: Navigating through multiple active threats without contact is tactical dexterity at tier-2.

quests.title: SPEED SWEEP
quests.brief: Both maps. Combined transit time under 90 seconds.
quests.objective: Travel through both maps consecutively in under 90 seconds total.
quests.hint: Speed with accuracy across both maps simultaneously requires deep spatial memory.

quests.title: COMBAT DODGE
quests.brief: In your next encounter, take no damage in the first two turns.
quests.objective: Complete the first two turns of any encounter without taking damage.
quests.hint: Dexterity in combat is about tempo. Win the early turns and the encounter follows.

quests.title: PATH MASTERY
quests.brief: All paths. No detours. Perfect path discipline across the full neighbourhood.
quests.objective: Walk every path tile in the neighbourhood without stepping on grass or walls.
quests.hint: Complete path mastery of the neighbourhood is the spatial awareness benchmark at tier-2.

quests.title: DISTRACTOR DODGE
quests.brief: A Distractor debuffs your movement. Navigate around it before it can.
quests.objective: Pass a Distractor operative without triggering its debuff effect.
quests.hint: The Distractor's threat is not HP — it is the movement penalty. Reading it early is the counter.

quests.title: NO-STOP TRANSIT
quests.brief: Both maps. One session. Zero pauses.
quests.objective: Move continuously through both maps without stopping for more than 1 second at any point.
quests.hint: Sustained continuous movement is the tier-2 endurance expression of dexterity.

quests.title: SHADOW SWEEP
quests.brief: Enter and exit the neighbourhood without any NPC registering your presence.
quests.objective: Complete a full neighbourhood circuit without entering any NPC's awareness range.
quests.hint: Invisible circuit completion is the tier-2 stealth standard.

quests.title: PERFECT RUN
quests.brief: Both maps. Zero wall contacts. Zero encounters triggered. Full coverage.
quests.objective: Traverse both maps without touching any wall, obstacle, or triggering any encounter.
quests.hint: The perfect run is the ultimate dexterity expression. Nothing in the world can stop what it cannot touch.

quests.title: FULL GHOST
quests.brief: Both maps. Not a single NPC or operative registers your signal.
quests.objective: Complete both maps without entering the detection range of any NPC or operative.
quests.hint: Total invisibility across the full world. The Faction cannot combat what it cannot locate.

quests.title: SPEED RECORD
quests.brief: Both maps. Under 60 seconds total. The System is timing.
quests.objective: Traverse both maps in under 60 seconds combined.
quests.hint: Maximum speed with complete coverage is the tier-3 performance ceiling.

quests.title: FIVE DODGE CHAIN
quests.brief: Five operatives. Five passes. Zero contact.
quests.objective: Pass within range of five different operatives without triggering any of them.
quests.hint: Five-threat navigation without contact requires simultaneous tracking of five movement patterns.

quests.title: COMBAT GHOST
quests.brief: Win an encounter without being hit once.
quests.objective: Complete an encounter without taking any damage.
quests.hint: Perfect combat execution is the intersection of dexterity and intelligence. Untouchable.

quests.title: THE INVISIBLE OPERATIVE
quests.brief: Enter. Collect everything. Leave. Never seen.
quests.objective: Collect all available scrolls in both maps without entering detection range of any entity.
quests.hint: The highest dexterity achievement combines speed, precision, and stealth in one operation.

quests.title: CLEAN WORLD
quests.brief: Both maps. Walls untouched. Encounters avoided. Full coverage. One session.
quests.objective: Complete both maps with zero wall contacts, zero encounter triggers, full territorial coverage.
quests.hint: Clean world completion is the definitive tier-3 dexterity record. The System acknowledges it permanently.

quests.title: PHANTOM PROTOCOL
quests.brief: Move through every room in the flat and every section of the neighbourhood without being detected or stopped once.
quests.objective: Complete total coverage of both maps without any wall contact, encounter trigger, or NPC detection.
quests.hint: The Phantom Protocol is the highest classification of movement mastery in the System. Logged permanently.
